name: Tesoro换热器失效事故
core_scenario: 设备完整性失效

causes.direct: 换热器管束长期高温氢损伤，材料强度严重劣化
causes.root: 未按规定执行高温氢腐蚀检验，设备完整性管理缺失

consequences: 遇点火源发生爆炸和火灾

safeguards.failure_reason: 设备在高温氢腐蚀下已脆化，报警触发时已来不及处置

recommendations: 建立高温氢腐蚀专项检验制度
对同类换热器进行全面完整性评估
完善操作程序，明确异常温度处置流程
key_physics: 高温氢损伤（HTHA）：高温高压氢气渗入钢材，与碳化物反应生成甲烷气泡，导致材料脆化
Nelson曲线：确定碳钢和低合金钢在不同温度压力下的氢腐蚀风险边界
embedding_text: heat exchanger failure high temperature hydrogen attack HTHA material degradation explosion fatality process safety integrity management

name: KMCO异构化装置爆炸事故
core_scenario: 失控反应

causes.direct: 异构化反应器温度失控，触发爆炸性失控反应
causes.root: 操作人员误判泄压阀动作为系统安全信号，未及时停车

safeguards.failure_reason: 操作人员错误认为PSV动作说明系统已在自动保护中，未按SOP执行紧急停车

recommendations: 明确PSV动作的应急处置流程：PSV起跳不等于系统安全
加强操作人员失控反应应急培训
安装独立的超温超压联锁切断系统
key_physics: 放热反应失控：反应放热速率超过散热速率，温度正反馈加速，Arrhenius动力学使反应速率随温度指数增长
PSV泄放能力局限：PSV按正常超压工况定径，失控反应产气速率可能远超PSV泄放能力
embedding_text: reactor runaway temperature high exothermic reaction pressure relief valve PSV misinterpretation operator error emergency shutdown HAZOP

name: West化肥厂硝酸铵爆炸事故
core_scenario: 危险物料火灾引发爆炸

deviation.abnormal_value: 火灾加热导致超过分解温度

causes.direct: 储罐区发生火灾，高温引发大量硝酸铵分解爆炸
causes.root: 硝酸铵储存量严重超标，消防部门未掌握危险物料信息，初期处置错误

consequences: 硝酸铵分解产生大量气体

safeguards.failure_reason: 消防用水引发硝酸铵溶液，并可能加速分解；消防队不知储罐内容物

recommendations: 强制要求向应急部门申报危险化学品储存信息
硝酸铵储存设施与居民区保持安全距离
制定针对硝酸铵火灾的专项应急预案（禁止使用大量水）
key_physics: 硝酸铵热分解：NH4NO3 → N2O + 2H2O（慢速分解），在高温或污染条件下可发生爆炸性分解
Trouton规则与热失控：分解反应放热大于散热时发生不可逆热失控
embedding_text: ammonium nitrate storage fire explosion temperature decomposition runaway emergency response hazardous materials chemical safety

name: 德克萨斯城炼油厂爆炸事故
core_scenario: 液位过高溢出

causes.direct: 操作人员持续向塔内进料，液位传感器失效导致液位显示不准确
causes.root: 管理层压力导致操作人员忽视异常信号，仪表维护不到位

consequences: 分馏塔液位过高，热烃液体溢出
大量可燃蒸气形成蒸气云
遇点火源发生蒸气云爆炸

safeguards.failure_reason: 液位传感器长期失准，高液位报警被操作人员忽视；管理层未落实安全文化

recommendations: 建立冗余液位测量系统
强化异常工况操作规程培训
建立安全文化，赋予操作人员停车权力
key_physics: 液位静压原理：液位传感器基于压差测量，传感器堵塞或管线内有气体时读数失真
闪蒸过程：过热液体泄压时急剧汽化，产生大量蒸气，体积急剧膨胀
embedding_text: distillation column level high overflow flammable vapor cloud explosion level sensor failure instrumentation alarm management culture

name: 杜邦Belle工厂氯气泄漏事故
core_scenario: 有毒气体泄漏

causes.direct: 氯气管道阀门密封失效，导致氯气持续泄漏
causes.root: 设备维护不到位，作业人员缺乏有毒气体泄漏应急知识

consequences: 作业人员吸入高浓度氯气

safeguards.failure_reason: 气体探测器报警后疏散不及时，作业人员未正确使用防毒面具

recommendations: 定期检查有毒气体管道阀门密封性
加强有毒气体泄漏应急演练
完善气体探测报警与自动通风联动系统
key_physics: 气体扩散规律：氯气密度比空气大，泄漏后在低洼区域聚集，LC50约430ppm
Fick扩散定律：浓度梯度驱动扩散，通风可有效降低局部浓度
embedding_text: chlorine gas leak toxic pipe valve seal failure gas detector alarm evacuation PPE chemical exposure occupational safety

name: Union Carbide博帕尔甲基异氰酸酯泄漏
core_scenario: 剧毒物质大规模泄漏

causes.direct: 水进入MIC储罐引发剧烈反应，大量热量和气体产生
causes.root: 多道安全系统同时失效（冷冻系统、洗涤塔、火炬系统），设备维护长期缺失

consequences: 约40吨甲基异氰酸酯蒸气外泄
形成致命蒸气云覆盖周边居民区
立即死亡约3787人，长期影响超20万人

safeguards.failure_reason: 冷冻系统关闭以节省成本，洗涤塔碱液耗尽，火炬系统在维修中，所有备份同时失效

recommendations: 危险物料储量最小化原则（Minimize Inventory）
关键安全系统冗余设计，禁止同时停用
工厂选址应与居民区保持足够安全距离
key_physics: MIC水解反应：CH3NCO + H2O → CO2 + CH3NH2，强放热反应，大量气体产生
蒸气压与温度：温度升高导致MIC蒸气压急剧上升，加速泄漏
embedding_text: MIC methyl isocyanate storage tank toxic release water contamination reaction pressure rise safety system failure catastrophic accident Bhopal

name: 菲利普斯石油公司反应器爆炸事故
core_scenario: 可燃气体释放爆炸

deviation.abnormal_value: 大量乙烯/己烷混合气体泄漏

causes.direct: 维修作业中手动阀位置确认程序缺失，阀门处于开启状态导致物料泄漏
causes.root: 操作锁定/挂牌程序（LOTO）执行不到位，书面作业许可流于形式

consequences: 大量乙烯和己烷泄漏形成蒸气云

safeguards.failure_reason: 承包商未严格执行LOTO，作业许可证审批流于形式，探测器报警时爆炸已发生

recommendations: 严格执行能量隔离程序（LOTO）
对承包商实施与正式员工同等的安全管理
建立独立的作业许可证审核机制
key_physics: 蒸气云爆炸（VCE）：可燃蒸气与空气混合达到爆炸极限（乙烯LEL=2.7%，UEL=36%），遇点火源发生爆炸
超压效应：爆炸超压波是建筑和人员伤亡的主要原因
embedding_text: polyethylene reactor ethylene vapor cloud explosion VCE LOTO lockout tagout permit to work contractor safety maintenance procedure

name: Tosco炼油厂石脑油塔失火事故
core_scenario: 热工作业引燃

causes.direct: 维修人员在未完全清空烃类物料的管道附近进行热工作业
causes.root: 作业前气体检测不充分，热工作业许可证审批未确认管道已安全隔离

consequences: 残余烃类遇热工火花起火
火势迅速扩大蔓延至分馏塔

safeguards.failure_reason: 气体检测仅检测了作业点，未检测管道内残余物料；隔离盲板未安装

recommendations: 热工作业前必须安装隔离盲板，不得仅依靠阀门隔离
气体检测需覆盖所有可能的泄漏路径
热工作业许可证由独立安全人员审批
key_physics: 最小点火能（MIE）：汽油蒸气MIE约0.24mJ，热工火花远超此值，极易点燃
闪点与着火范围：石脑油闪点低，在常温下即可形成可燃蒸气

name: Intercontinental Terminals Company (ITC) Tank Fire
core_scenario: A massive fire erupted in a storage tank farm handling flammable liquids.

causes.direct: A large flammable liquid release and tank fire occurred in the terminal tank farm.
causes.root: Deficiencies in process safety management, leak detection, isolation, and tank farm engineering controls.

safeguards.failure_reason: Leak detection, emergency isolation, and tank farm design/spacing controls were insufficient.

recommendations: Install flammable gas detection in storage and transfer areas
Use remotely operated fail-closed emergency isolation valves
Evaluate tank farm spacing, containment, drainage, and fire protection
Implement a process safety management system for atmospheric storage tanks

causes.root: Tank overfill prevention and vapor release controls were inadequate.

Expand flammable liquid risk coverage and tank safety controls

name: BP America (Texas City) Refinery Explosion
equipment: raffinate splitter distillation tower and blowdown drum
core_scenario: During startup, the raffinate splitter distillation tower overfilled, sending flammable hydrocarbons to the atmosphere where they ignited.

deviation.normal_value: 20-30 vertical feet of liquid at the tower bottom

causes.direct: Tower overfill and blowdown drum discharge released flammable hydrocarbons that ignited.
causes.root: Known instrument/alarm problems, inadequate startup decision-making, and poor process safety / mechanical integrity management.

safeguards.failure_reason: Level instrumentation and alarms failed or were known deficient; blowdown vented to atmosphere rather than flare.

recommendations: Improve startup safety and instrument reliability
Eliminate unsafe atmospheric blowdown arrangements
Strengthen process safety and mechanical integrity oversight

name: Silver Eagle Refinery Flash Fire and Explosion and Catastrophic Pipe Explosion
core_scenario: A tank vapor cloud flash fire was followed later by a catastrophic pipe failure caused by long-term corrosion.

causes.direct: Large flammable vapor release from tank area caused flash fire; later a 10-inch pipe failed explosively.
causes.root: Pipe wall thinning from corrosion went uninspected for years; storage/piping integrity controls were inadequate.

consequences: 4 serious burn injuries in first event
blast damage to nearby homes in second event

existing: tank farm and refinery piping systems
safeguards.failure_reason: Corrosion damage and release hazards were not adequately detected or controlled.

recommendations: Improve corrosion inspection of refinery piping
Strengthen tank farm vapor release prevention and ignition control

core_scenario: Hot work near terminal equipment led to a flash fire that injured multiple workers.

deviation.abnormal_value: flammable material present in or near line/equipment

causes.direct: Hot work encountered flammable material, causing flash fire.
causes.root: Isolation, line clearing, and hot work hazard controls were inadequate.

safeguards.failure_reason: Energy/material isolation was not sufficient for safe hot work.

Strengthen hot work permitting and verification

name: First Chemical Corp. Reactive Chemical Explosion
core_scenario: An MNT distillation tower thought to be isolated remained heated, decomposed, and violently exploded.

deviation.abnormal_value: MNT remained hot and continued heating; exact value not specified

causes.direct: Thermal decomposition inside the distillation tower generated gases and led to explosion.
causes.root: Residual MNT was left in the tower, steam leakage continued heating, and the system lacked adequate alarms, interlocks, and relief protection.

safeguards.failure_reason: The tower lacked high-temperature alarms, shutdown interlocks, and effective pressure relief for decomposition.

recommendations: Install effective high-temperature alarms and interlocks
Provide relief protection for decomposition scenarios
Improve shutdown isolation verification

causes.root: The process hazard analysis was incomplete and explosion hazards of nitric oxide were not adequately evaluated and controlled.

safeguards.failure_reason: Hazard evaluation and explosion-resistant design measures were insufficient.

recommendations: Improve process hazard analysis for reactive gas systems
Design for explosion consequences and shielding
Strengthen upset response procedures

consequences: destruction of plant and nearby building damage

Assess decomposition hazards during shutdown and hold periods
Apply inherently safer limits for reactive intermediates

name: Kuraray Pasadena Release and Fire
equipment: EVAL Reactor 2 and emergency pressure-relief discharge piping

deviation.normal_value: reactor pressure below alarm limits during startup
deviation.abnormal_value: high-pressure alarm conditions in reactor; exact value not specified in CSB summary

causes.direct: High-pressure conditions activated relief and flammable ethylene vapor was discharged to an unsafe location.
causes.root: Relief system discharge design was unsafe and startup/alarm response controls were inadequate.

safeguards.failure_reason: The relief system vented flammable vapor near workers instead of to a safe location, and operator response did not restore safe pressure.

recommendations: Redesign emergency relief discharge to a safe location
Improve alarm response guidance during startup
Reduce worker exposure during startup and upset conditions

name: Synthron Inc. Explosion and Fire
core_scenario: A runaway chemical reaction in a process vessel caused an explosion and fire that destroyed the facility.

deviation.abnormal_value: runaway overpressure; exact value not specified in CSB release

causes.direct: A runaway chemical reaction in the process vessel led to explosion and fire.
causes.root: Management of reactive chemical hazards was inadequate and the facility was unprepared for a process emergency.

safeguards.failure_reason: Reactive hazard controls and emergency preparedness were insufficient.

recommendations: Strengthen reactive hazard management
Improve emergency preparedness for process upsets
Assess runaway scenarios in vessel design and operation
embedding_text: synthron runaway reaction process vessel overpressure explosion fire reactive hazard emergency

name: MGPI Processing, Inc. Toxic Chemical Release
equipment: chemical unloading line and tank farm day tank
core_scenario: A delivery truck was mistakenly connected to a tank containing incompatible material, producing a toxic gas cloud that affected workers and the community.

deviation.normal_value: correct chemical transfer to intended receiving tank
deviation.abnormal_value: misdirected transfer of sulfuric acid into incompatible material tank

causes.direct: Sulfuric acid was inadvertently transferred into a tank containing incompatible sodium hypochlorite, generating a toxic gas cloud.
causes.root: Connection management, unloading controls, and incompatibility safeguards were inadequate.

safeguards.failure_reason: Transfer line identification and connection safeguards failed to prevent incompatible mixing.

recommendations: Improve transfer connection verification
Prevent incompatible chemical unloading errors
Strengthen community emergency notification and response
embedding_text: mgpi tank farm unloading sulfuric acid sodium hypochlorite incompatible mixing toxic gas cloud

name: Husky Energy Superior Refinery Explosion and Fire
equipment: FCC unit vessels and nearby asphalt storage tank
core_scenario: Explosions in the FCC unit propelled debris that punctured a nearby asphalt storage tank, spilling hot asphalt that ignited and caused multiple fires.

deviation.abnormal_value: large uncontrolled asphalt release after tank puncture

causes.direct: FCC unit explosions sent metal fragments into a nearby asphalt tank, causing a large hot asphalt spill and fire.
causes.root: The refinery lacked adequate safeguards to anticipate and limit escalating consequences during shutdown upset conditions.

safeguards.failure_reason: Debris impact vulnerability and escalation pathways were not adequately controlled.

recommendations: Address escalation hazards between process units and storage
Improve shutdown upset consequence analysis
Strengthen safeguards for fragment impact and hot material release
embedding_text: husky superior storage tank asphalt puncture explosion debris hot release fire escalation

name: Concept Sciences Hydroxylamine Explosion
equipment: process vessel and associated piping after hydroxylamine distillation
core_scenario: After the distillation step was stopped, hydroxylamine in the tank and associated piping decomposed violently and exploded.

deviation.abnormal_value: decomposition conditions after distillation shutdown; exact value not specified in CSB report excerpt

causes.direct: Hydroxylamine in the process vessel and piping explosively decomposed.
causes.root: The decomposition hazard of hydroxylamine under shutdown/hold conditions was not adequately controlled.

safeguards.failure_reason: Shutdown conditions did not prevent hazardous decomposition in the retained material.

recommendations: Control decomposition-sensitive materials during shutdown
Assess reactive hazards in vessels and associated piping
Use safer concentration and temperature limits
